title: Fit Test - Tab is present and accessible in Device Settings
scenario: Fit Test tab is present and accessible in Device Settings when a supported device is connected
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200, Poly Voyager 4320, etc.).
3. Open the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
4. On the Device Settings screen, locate the Fit Test tab.
5. Confirm the Fit Test tab is visible and displayed in the list of available tabs/settings.
7. Verify that the Fit Test screen opens and displays the Fit Test interface.
expected: The Fit Test tab is visible in Device Settings when a supported device is connected. Tapping the Fit Test tab opens the Fit Test screen successfully.
